score_evidence.completeness: Required components: Architectural Construction Drawing Set ✓ (9 sheet types listed), Technical Specifications Package ✓, Public Bidding Technical Documents ✓ (catálogo de conceptos for licitación pública). Engineering coordination: structural ✓, electrical ✓, plumbing_hydraulic ✓, solar ✓, landscape_irrigation ✓. Sustainability package ✓ (solar, passive design, accessibility matrix). Score 4 (not 5): rubric requires plan_set_components with cross_sections, full_plan_book, technical_coordination fields — executive-plans.json uses 'components' array structure, not the exact schema field names. Rubric also requires client_signoff_milestone field — not present in the deliverable.
score_evidence.accuracy: coordination_conflicts_resolved=true. No unresolved conflicts between architectural and engineering drawings. Score 5.
score_evidence.clarity: Score 4: Package is described as complete but client_signoff_milestone is not logged. Without a sign-off milestone, Vera cannot confirm client has accepted the plan set before Ofelia begins bidding. This creates a gap in the handoff chain.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 (simulated run — ASANA_UNAVAILABLE). executive_plans_in_progress → executive_plans_approved state and client sign-off milestone not confirmed in live Asana.
score_evidence.timing: Executive plans produced after budget alignment approval (DG-09). Before Ofelia begins bidding (DG-10 leads to DG-11 bidding phase). Score 5.
score_evidence.decision_readiness: Score 4: Marcela can approve and hand off to Ofelia. Minor gap: no client_signoff_milestone field means the contracting entity's formal acceptance of the plan set is not explicitly captured.

decision_commentary: Solid executive plans package. All drawing types present, engineering coordination complete across all systems, Public Bidding Technical Documents (catálogo de conceptos) ready for licitación pública. Two schema gaps: (1) exact schema fields (plan_set_components with cross_sections, full_plan_book, technical_coordination) not used — components array structure used instead; (2) client_signoff_milestone field absent. No auto-fail conditions triggered (cross sections present within the sheet list, no unresolved coordination conflicts, all system drawings present).
celia_routing_notes: DG-10 routes to Ofelia (executive plans approved — dispatch Ofelia for bidding and permitting). decision-event-DG-10.json: route_to=Ofelia. Correct per segment H→I flow.
